name: Utkarsh Tyagi
tagline: Building agentic AI systems and RAG pipelines that turn unstructured information into decisions people can act on.
about: I'm an AI Engineer working at the intersection of large language models, retrieval, and applied ML. My focus is on agentic systems — multi-step pipelines where models make decisions, call tools, and pause for a human when their confidence drops. Currently building RAG-based investment intelligence at Mandala Capital, with prior experience deploying ML and analytics systems for Fortune 500 clients at Deloitte. Master's in Business Analytics from NUS, with a Computer Science background.
